what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG warning icon: a filled triangular alert shape using currentColor with a white exclamation mark inside.
observations: Root svg sets viewBox="0 0 24 24" with no default fill and currentColor stroke styling.
The triangle is drawn as a closed path from the top center to the lower right and lower left, filled with currentColor and no stroke.
The exclamation mark is a separate path with a fixed #FFFFFF stroke.
Stroke width is 1.5 with round line caps and joins.
standouts: Uses currentColor for the warning triangle while fixing the internal mark to white.
The exclamation dot is represented as a tiny vertical path segment from V17 to V17.01.
conventions: Follows inline SVG icon conventions with a 24x24 viewBox and currentColor-driven outer color.
Uses path primitives only, with no ids, classes, scripts, metadata, or external references.
Mixes theme-driven color for the shape with hard-coded color for the internal mark.
concerns: The inner exclamation mark is fixed to #FFFFFF, so it does not inherit color like the outer shape.
notes: A compact filled warning-triangle icon with a white internal alert mark.
questions: Is the white exclamation mark intentionally fixed rather than theme-controlled?
Is the warning triangle intended to be filled rather than outlined?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename indicates a warning icon, and the SVG content matches that purpose.
intention_signals: It seems intended to provide a reusable warning or caution symbol whose outer color can follow surrounding text or icon color while preserving a white exclamation mark.
novelty: The dot of the exclamation mark is encoded as a very short stroked segment rather than a circle element.
contribution: Contributes a compact currentColor warning icon substrate with a filled triangular silhouette and a contrasting internal exclamation mark for alert states.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 SVG warning icon made from a currentColor-filled triangle and a fixed white stroked exclamation mark.
intention_for_embedding: It was for representing warning or caution states in an icon set with a color-inheriting outer shape.
